description: Experience the thrill of the open road with our interactive email, designed for the adventurous spirits who live for the roar of engines, the rhythm of two wheels on the highway, and the camaraderie of fellow riders. This engaging communication tool is perfect for men who love their motorcycles, enjoy the freedom of the ride, and appreciate the beauty of nature. Join us in celebrating National Motorcycle Week, a unique event that combines the exhilaration of a race with the fun of live music. Our email includes an invite to the main stage and a map marking the exciting route of the week-long journey. Whether you're a fan of sports, automotive, or simply enjoy a good ride, this email will put a smile on your face. So gear up, and let's hit the road!
short_description: Join the celebration of National Motorcycle Week with our interactive email. Perfect for men who love engines, two wheels, and the freedom of the open road. Includes an invite to the event, a map of the route, and a promise of a week filled with music, nature, and camaraderie. A unique blend of sports, automotive, and adventure that will surely make you smile. Gear up and hit the road!

designer.description: My name is Darko Kosanin. I like to turn ideas into something visible. I feel great pleasure when I create something new, using various shapes and combinations of colors, fonts and elements into a new and original design. I am also a web developer, so I turn the design into codes with the same pleasure.

12 - 18th September
 

You are invite to celebrate!

NATIONAL

MOTORCYCLE

WEEK

 
RSVP
 
 
 
 
 

ENJOY

 

THE FREEDOM OF RIDING

 

The cost of a motorcycle along with the incredible fuel efficiency makes these vehicles perfect for the economically minded. On the other hand, if you just like the speed and power you can get out of one of these bad boys, then this holiday is your excuse to get out and tear up some pavement.

 
 

250 km Track   |

 
 

2 Race days  |

 
 

550 + Riders
